channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping in the walk through, 2nd July
item.description:
Pile of clothes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilton Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fountain broken, 2nd July
item.description:
Fountain is broken Instead of wasting money on pride get some real pride by getting the pond a good one off clean and then a regular proper steady filter so things are nice and green If someone would please set up a donation page would be great
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Common, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags, 2nd July
item.description:
Pile of Bin Bags piled up outside park containing god knows!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on wall of building at 296 Brixton road SW9. Please can it be jet-sprayed off the wall., 2nd July
item.description:
Graffiti sprayed on wall of building at 296 Brixton road SW9. Please can it be jet-sprayed off the wall. The graffiti is in green spray paint and has been there for approximately two weeks. I would be very grateful if it could be jet-sprayed off the wall.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 296,298, Brixton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike abandoned blocking path and driveways for 3 days., 2nd July
item.description:
Lime bike abandoned blocking path and driveways for 3 days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodyates Road, Blackheath, Greater London

item.title: Dumped chair, 2nd July
item.description:
Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Fellbrigg Road, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping of chairs, 2nd July
item.description:
People persistently abandon used furniture items here. And currently six office chairs have just been left next to the bins. The chairs are also blocking access to my parking space.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Theydon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

Fly tip on pavement outside no 78

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gunton Road, Hackney, London

Wooden planks fly tippes. Been there a few days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Avenue, Southgate

item.title: Blocked drains Pickhurst Green outside no’s 16/17, 2nd July
item.description:
One drain is completely blocked up (on the houses side), others on the opposite side of the road are blocking too - debris hasn t been swept away recently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickhurst Green, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste dumped on clifden road again, 2nd July
item.description:
Fly tipped household waste dumped and bag split with rubbish strewn all over the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Overhanging foliage, 2nd July
item.description:
I am 5'2" and it brushes against my head.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Manor Road, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several wardrobe panels against property and a cabinet are cluttering the pavment. This has been outside the property for at least 2 months, 2nd July
item.description:
Pavement access is impeded and this could be dangerous especially for young children and visually impaired residents.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Humber Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of gravel dumped in the gutter on the bend in Cumberland Road, 2nd July
item.description:
At about 2.15 a.m. a white van with an orange rotating light on top stopped just before the bend on Cumberland Road and a man in high-vis clothes appeared to be doing something with the small Thames Water inspection cover located in the road. This morning the pile of gravel had appeared about a yard away from the inspection cover, which now appears to be leaking. This gravel is located only a few yards from the kerbside drain on the bend in Cumberland Road which already gets blocked in heavy rain and this gravel will be washed towards this drain and needs to be cleared please. In addition all the drains on that side of the road between the bend in Cumberland Road and the Durham Avenue crossroads are blocked with silt as are the first drains round the corner into both Durham Avenue and Highfield Drive. Water cannot drain into them and ends up overwhelming the drain on the bend in Cumberland Road, creating a small lake in heavy rainfall. Please clear these drains.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cumberland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Private traffic cones blocking public parking spaces., 2nd July
item.description:
Traffic cones are left on the public highway 15 Versailles Road. SE20 8AX. They block a public parking bay. This obstruction happens daily. It prevents others from using public space. Please arrange for their removal.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Versailles Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large broken branch fallen into road, 2nd July
item.description:
Outside Monkfrith Primary School near to 55 Knoll Drive a large branch has broken and lots of the tree has fallen into the road. Blocking the end of the road disrupting parking opportunities.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Knoll Drive, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boulder shock Giant mountain bije, 2nd July
item.description:
Bike dumped in BENHILL garden near Bantry Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brunswick Park, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rain drain completely blocked up with debris, 2nd July
item.description:
This drain is full of debris and is back up to my house on 42 arrol road. The rain water from my house goes down into the mains and is blocked by debris from this drain. My porch has flooded twice in the recent rain as the water comes back up to my house. Please can this be cleared ASAP. If there is another heavy rain my porch might flood again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Arrol Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken paving slabs, 2nd July
item.description:
A house on the bend has had a lot of building and garden work done, the lorries carrying out this work parked half on the pavements and have broken many pavement slabs. the runup for their cars is right on the bend, and either side of this, on the left is the front of the house and on the right is the back and side of the house, so either side of the runup there are broken slabs causing a trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birchwood Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carriageway breaking up, 2nd July
item.description:
Long term issue which hasn’t been resolved, urgent works required

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Pepys Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
